title: Peer/* S2S translation layer
description: Implement federation between nie-daemons following the JMAP-CHAT-FED companion spec (draft-atwood-jmap-chat-federation). Peer/* methods (Peer/deliver, Peer/receipt, Peer/typing, Peer/retract, Peer/groupUpdate) are defined there, not in the base JMAP Chat spec. Transport: carry these as ClearMessage variants inside MLS-encrypted relay messages. Each receiving nie-daemon unpacks and applies the operation locally. The relay still sees only opaque blobs. Peer server authentication model also defined in JMAP-CHAT-FED.
close_reason: Peer/* S2S translation layer complete: ClearMessage variants, dispatch functions, update_message_delivery_state store method, 8 new tests, non-exhaustive match fixes in CLI/TUI/bot
